locked.coi_flag: Federal loans/subsidies required. Trump family ownership creates potential preferential treatment risk vs. competing startups.

barriers.title: Tritium Scarcity
barriers.detail: ~25kg global supply. Lithium blanket breeding unproven at commercial scale.

barriers.title: Materials Degradation
barriers.detail: Neutron bombardment degrades structural components faster than fission. No material validated for full commercial duty cycle. EU €340M research program launched Jan 2026.

barriers.title: Timeline Slippage History
barriers.detail: ITER over $22B and years behind. Fusion timelines have historically slipped by 5-10 years across all major programs.

barriers.title: Net Energy Positive at Grid Scale
barriers.detail: NIF achieved ignition in 2022 but energy output was laser-input dependent. Commercial energy positive remains undemonstrated at utility scale.

milestone_banner.text: In June 2026, Helion secured regulatory licenses for the world's first fusion power plant in Washington state, while DOE approved Xcimer's laser fusion design and CFS became the first fusion company to apply for PJM grid interconnection.

kstar.name: KSTAR
kstar.description: KSTAR achieved 100 million degree ion temperature in late 2025 while operating in full tungsten environment. Ongoing experiments target extending 100-million-degree plasma operation toward 300-second goal.

cfs.name: Commonwealth Fusion
cfs.description: CFS published five peer-reviewed papers validating ARC physics and became the first fusion company to apply for PJM grid interconnection. SPARC construction continues with installed magnets and AI digital twin development with Nvidia/Siemens, targeting 2027 first plasma.

helion.name: Helion Energy
helion.description: Helion secured key licenses for building and operating its fusion power plant in Central Washington in June 2026. Company raised $465M at $15.5B valuation while advancing OpenAI power deal negotiations alongside existing Microsoft PPA.

tae.name: TAE Technologies / TMTG
tae.description: TAE-TMTG $6B merger advances with Truth Social spinoff cancelled, confirming integrated company structure. Jeff Woodbury appointed TAE President/COO as parties reaffirm mid-2026 close timeline pending SEC S-4 clearance.

iter.name: ITER
iter.description: ITER magnet cold test facility begins operations, marking key assembly milestone. French regulator exempts vacuum vessel from fission-based rules, streamlining path to first plasma.

east.name: EAST / China Program
east.description: EAST tokamak exceeded the Greenwald density limit in January 2026, achieving plasma densities previously considered theoretically impossible. China continues advancing high-density plasma research alongside KSTAR as a global leader in sustained fusion experiments.

timeline.title: Merger Announced
timeline.detail: All-stock deal signed. Boards approved. DJT stock +33% on day of.

timeline.title: $200M Cash to TAE at Signing
timeline.detail: Additional $100M available on SEC Form S-4 filing.

timeline.title: Shareholder + Regulatory Close
timeline.detail: SEC S-4 review ongoing. Truth Social spinoff cancelled; integrated company structure confirmed. Jeff Woodbury appointed TAE President/COO. Trump Jr. joins board. Mid-2026 close target reaffirmed.

timeline.title: Plant Site Selection Begins
timeline.detail: Nunes stated site search begins after deal closes.

timeline.title: First Power Generation Target
timeline.detail: TAE's stated goal for first electricity from utility-scale plant.

dynamic.auto_update_summary: Auto-updated 6/6 companies via Claude + RSS. Locked fields unchanged.
